productDisplayName: Highlander Men Blue White Plaid Checked Shirt
description: CompositionFull sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, has blue and white plaid checks with yellow accents, tape detailing on the in-seam of the collar, patch pocket on the left chest with mirror look panelling, full length buttoned placket and curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degree C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this   blue and white plaid check shirt from highlander. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. The mirrored panel on the left chest adds to it a unique sense of fashion. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
